challenge: Give a single-location café a brand with the swagger of a streetwear label — something that could scale to merch, social, and eventually a second location without losing its edge.
title: Coffee, without the ceremony
solution: The S-mark became the anchor: monogram and mascot in one, cropped and rotated to create tension. Yellow and navy did the heavy lifting across every surface — cups, cards, Instagram, digital menus. The brand worked hardest at its smallest size, which is where most café brands fall apart.
